---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://ivannadeanda.shinyapps.io/ile_dashboard/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Greenspace and Heat Exposure Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>My Master's thesis focused on characterizing the natural and built environments at different scales using high-resolution imagery and machine learning methods. This dashboard displays some of the results from my project.</p>
</div>
